freshBrief: A local-first desktop todo app focused on a polished, minimal interface and durable session-based workflow.
hubNotes: Hub should help choose or shape the next app slice, not launch dispatch on its own.
Workers do not need docs/SESSIONS.md unless their dispatch explicitly asks for it.
Shipping target is Windows 11; macOS is a development convenience.
Use agents/OBSERVATIONS.md for general usage notes and ideas; triage via observations-protocol.md.
